objective: Secure cotton gin perimeter and preserve trace evidence.
opposition: Clay pressures for a quick close and summer heat degrades blood pattern edges.
turn: A yearbook photo confirms the second corpse resembles Isaiah Bell.
consequence_cost: Case instantly becomes political and every evidence decision gains public cost.

objective: Canvass gin workers for timeline before rumor overtakes memory.
opposition: Workers fear retaliation and offer rehearsed non-answers.
turn: A mechanic reports a county-marked refrigerated van leaving before dawn.
consequence_cost: Suspicion shifts toward insider logistics and inflames union mistrust.

objective: Set investigative scope at night briefing.
opposition: Sheriff demands a narrow script for press and city hall.
turn: Lena rejects scripted certainty and requests state-lab priority intake.
consequence_cost: Clay marks Lena as noncompliant and narrows her future room to maneuver.

objective: Re-enter normal life at church fish fry to stabilize family.
opposition: Ida deflects any mention of 1963 while neighbors treat case as spectacle.
turn: Ida slips and references papers your father should have burned.
consequence_cost: Lena realizes family archives may hold case-critical facts.

objective: Search storage unit for the referenced papers.
opposition: Flood damage, missing boxes, and closing-time pressure slow the search.
turn: Lena finds coded notebook index with Mercer docket notation.
consequence_cost: She chooses obsession over rest and misses Jalen's evening call.

objective: Verify morgue chain of custody at start of shift.
opposition: Logbook and camera timestamps conflict and staff close ranks.
turn: Isaiah's body is missing from cold storage before notification goes out.
consequence_cost: Inside access moves from theory to immediate operational threat.

objective: Process second scene at river ramp before contamination.
opposition: Crowd gathers, phones record, and officers argue over perimeter control.
turn: Second victim Lyle Fenn is found with Isaiah's body staged beside him.
consequence_cost: Public panic spikes and anti-police narrative hardens.

objective: Preserve investigative flexibility through command meeting.
opposition: Clay imposes secrecy terms and excludes external partners.
turn: Closed task force formed with direct sheriff oversight.
consequence_cost: Lena loses informal channels and must work within hostile command constraints.

objective: Run forensics to test whether one body is reappearing.
opposition: Tissue degradation and missing archival references slow certainty.
turn: Dr. Rao confirms mixed remains with recent preservative chemistry.
consequence_cost: Supernatural rumors collapse but evidence tampering appears systemic.

objective: Trace preservative and transport pathways.
opposition: County clerks deny records and funeral routes are undocumented in parts.
turn: Transport logs converge on county crematory and Bell and Sons transfer routes.
consequence_cost: Focus shifts to logistics network and risks stigmatizing Bell family descendants.

objective: Keep protest corridor from turning violent while tracking leads.
opposition: Protesters and counter-protesters both target Lena by name.
turn: Flyers with Lena's home address spread through the crowd.
consequence_cost: Case pressure invades private life and increases family danger.

objective: Defend investigative strategy in emergency command hearing.
opposition: Mayor wants an arrest timeline and Clay frames dissent as disorder.
turn: Lena is suspended pending internal review.
consequence_cost: She loses badge access and cannot legally direct evidence handling.

objective: Secure family after suspension and decide next move.
opposition: Marcus demands she step back and legal counsel warns against contact.
turn: Lena chooses to continue through unofficial channels with Mara.
consequence_cost: Custody friction rises and any misstep can become criminal exposure.

objective: Hold a non-strategic family dinner to reduce fear.
opposition: Conversation keeps drifting toward danger and blame.
turn: Jalen asks whether police can lie and expects a real answer.
consequence_cost: Lena's authority as mother and detective fractures at once.

objective: Decode her father's notebook without database access.
opposition: Codes reference obsolete parcel tags and Lena is exhausted.
turn: Parcel tags map to Gideon Tract transfer years.
consequence_cost: Historical land theft becomes concrete motive terrain.

objective: Plan archive entry with Mara and assign legal fallback.
opposition: Mutual distrust over source control and publication timing.
turn: Mara agrees to proceed if no document is hidden from community counsel.
consequence_cost: Partnership forms under brittle terms that can break later.

objective: Enter chancery archive after hours and pull sealed files.
opposition: Alarm sensors, missing folders, and time pressure reduce search depth.
turn: Coroner packet and redacted heir list appear with Deputy Waller signature.
consequence_cost: Lena's father moves from background figure to implicated actor.

objective: Exit without seizure and protect the find.
opposition: Night clerk notices them and could trigger charges.
turn: Clerk accepts payment and warns records are being moved by morning.
consequence_cost: They escape with copies but inherit blackmail risk and legal exposure.

objective: Work Ava Boyd scene and isolate signature changes.
opposition: Crowd grief targets police and perimeter keeps collapsing.
turn: Tagged teeth jar replaces earlier full-body staging pattern.
consequence_cost: Potential second operator enters the case and fear multiplies.

objective: Address community meeting before retaliation escalates.
opposition: Families reject police language and demand record access now.
turn: Lena commits to a release timeline tied to chain-of-custody milestones.
consequence_cost: Her personal credibility becomes collateral if command blocks disclosure.

objective: Negotiate reinstatement to regain evidence access.
opposition: Clay imposes surveillance terms and script control.
turn: Lena accepts reinstatement under monitoring.
consequence_cost: She regains formal access but loses strategic independence.

objective: Argue for broad warrants covering trusts and transport records.
opposition: Judge narrows scope after political pressure from county donors.
turn: Only partial warrant is granted.
consequence_cost: Critical evidence remains shielded, forcing narrower inference path.

objective: Exploit granted scope to find usable financial links.
opposition: Shell entities and partial ledgers obscure beneficial ownership.
turn: Payment schedule ties trust outflows to Hollis Reddick entities.
consequence_cost: Law-enforcement family link enters record and strains team trust.

objective: Interview Otis Mayfield in a low-pressure setting.
opposition: Otis evades direct questions and mocks official language.
turn: Shared food and humor lower his guard enough for memory fragments.
consequence_cost: Investigation gains human context but no sworn testimony yet.

objective: Convert fragment memory into actionable location data.
opposition: Otis fears retaliation and refuses formal statement.
turn: He hands over a hand-drawn map from his guitar case to the icehouse site.
consequence_cost: Lead becomes searchable but evidentiary value stays fragile.

objective: Execute pre-dawn entry at abandoned icehouse.
opposition: Flooded flooring and rusted locks slow the team.
turn: Inside, ledger spines and docket labels are visually confirmed.
consequence_cost: They have seconds of confirmation but no secure custody yet.

objective: Hold scene when federal team arrives unexpectedly.
opposition: Federal agents claim jurisdiction and force local withdrawal.
turn: Evidence is seized and Beau's wrist is broken in the scramble.
consequence_cost: Local case loses core material and team capacity drops.

objective: Regroup in ER corridor and salvage any traceable detail.
opposition: Anger and pain turn team against Lena's decision timing.
turn: Dr. Rao quietly provides the seized-box serial number.
consequence_cost: Only off-record breadcrumbs remain, raising admissibility risk.

objective: Repair working alliance at hospital bedside.
opposition: Beau blames Lena and considers leaving task force.
turn: He shares memory of Hollis at the morgue loading bay during night transfer.
consequence_cost: A small trust repair adds new directional lead.

objective: Rebuild case map from notes, photos, and probate archives.
opposition: Missing originals prevent clean evidentiary chain.
turn: Serial cross-match identifies Thomas Pike as trust disbursement gatekeeper.
consequence_cost: Prevention focus shifts to Pike household timeline.

objective: Build gala security plan around predicted threat window.
opposition: Pike rejects cancellation and staffing cannot cover all ingress points.
turn: Lena adopts perimeter-first plan despite known blind spots.
consequence_cost: Foreseeable vulnerability is accepted under political constraint.

objective: Walk venue to identify least defensible corridor.
opposition: Private contractors refuse expanded police access without warrant authority.
turn: Lena marks service corridor as likely breach route she cannot lock down.
consequence_cost: She enters event night expecting failure points she cannot solve.

objective: Monitor gala floor before scheduled trust announcement.
opposition: Public calm masks elite panic and rival narratives.
turn: Power cuts during the toast and comms fail.
consequence_cost: Control fragments before any formal scene security can form.

objective: Search blackout corridors and triage injuries.
opposition: Darkness, crowd crush, and command confusion scramble priorities.
turn: Thomas Pike is found dead and Isaiah's body appears again in service corridor.
consequence_cost: Sheriff exploits chaos to launch instant activist blame narrative.

objective: Extract actionable truth from Eleanor Pike before narrative seals.
opposition: Clay blocks access and pushes Lena toward crowd-control duty.
turn: Pike slips safe combination and names Hollis as evidence mover.
consequence_cost: Lena gains proof path but becomes direct target of command retaliation.

objective: Open Pike safe and authenticate documents quickly.
opposition: Fear of raid and internal doubt about chain integrity.
turn: Mercer docket confirms coordinated land seizure and Deputy Waller signatures.
consequence_cost: Truth is documented but personally devastating for Lena.

objective: Choose release strategy before sheriff can confiscate copies.
opposition: Ida begs Lena to redact her father's name to spare family memory.
turn: Lena leaks docket unredacted to Mara and Bell counsel.
consequence_cost: Family rupture becomes immediate and likely long-term.

objective: Prevent false closure at sheriff press conference.
opposition: Clay scripts Lena as witness to fabricated probable cause.
turn: Lena publicly rejects the arrest narrative and names evidentiary gaps.
consequence_cost: She is terminated on the spot and isolated from official channels.

objective: Mitigate harm after termination by contacting defense counsel.
opposition: No badge means no jail access and Deshawn is held overnight.
turn: Lena relays key facts through public defender hotline and media backchannel.
consequence_cost: Deshawn remains harmed by detention while support network mobilizes.

objective: Record Ruth Bell's full statement before she disappears.
opposition: Ruth distrusts police and expects betrayal from all institutions.
turn: She admits killing Voss and Fenn and details motive rooted in land theft.
consequence_cost: Case splits into morally complex admissions and non-admitted later murders.

objective: Protect the recording when Hollis arrives to intimidate.
opposition: Hollis threatens arrest and confiscation without warrant basis.
turn: Mara initiates public livestream and mirrors files to remote editors.
consequence_cost: Suppression attempt backfires and confrontation becomes public evidence.

objective: Convert public disclosure into legal traction.
opposition: Federal offices resist immediate commitment due chain concerns.
turn: Dual-track federal inquiry opens and Deshawn is ordered released.
consequence_cost: Narrative control exits local command but outcomes remain uncertain.

objective: Track formal aftermath across pleas, resignations, and civil filings.
opposition: Plea agreements reduce prison exposure for top officeholders.
turn: Court freezes Gideon Tract pending restitution litigation.
consequence_cost: Material consequence is real but incomplete, preserving moral discomfort.

objective: Stage Isaiah Bell's reburial and close on altered lives.
opposition: Family wounds and public distrust remain unresolved at the graveside.
turn: Ida attends without full reconciliation; Lena and Mara commit to independent investigations.
consequence_cost: Ending lands on changed structures with grief still active.
